programme.title: Just for Laughs: Gags
programme.desc: There's no sound, but there sure are plenty of laughs. This crazy Quebec-based troupe uses the city as its stage, and its inhabitants, or victims, as characters! People are caught in a twisted yet funny web of comedic deception. This updated "Candid Camera" is a tad more risque and a little kookier with its practical jokes. The little snippets last only a few minutes, and some look more painful than others.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Just for Laughs: Gags
programme.desc: There's no sound, but there sure are plenty of laughs. This crazy Quebec-based troupe uses the city as its stage, and its inhabitants, or victims, as characters! programme.title: Halifax Comedy Festival
programme.desc: Performances by Rich Hall, Nick Beaton, Sophie Buddle, Bree Parsons, Nigel Lawrence, Jen Grant, Casey Corbin, Chris Halef and Clifton Cremo.

programme.title: Just for Laughs
programme.desc: Ronny Chieng hosts a night of comedy at the Just for Laughs Festival in Montreal; with Rashid Badouri, Alonzo Bodden, Julie Kim, Jay Pharaoh, Nish Kumar and Nimesh Patel.

programme.title: Just for Laughs
programme.desc: Hannah Gadsby returns to Montreal to host a "Just for Laughs" gala featuring Ryan Hamilton, DeAnne Smith, Hisham Kelati, Sheng Wang and Maria Bamford.

programme.title: This Hour Has 22 Minutes
programme.desc: "22 Minutes" takes on climate change, "Dune" in the oil sands and a new way to pay for Remembrance Day poppies.

programme.title: This Hour Has 22 Minutes
programme.desc: The U.S. border is back open; COVID hits "Sesame Street"; higher learning at a cannabis college.

programme.title: This Hour Has 22 Minutes
programme.desc: Celebrating "Soulvember;" the Green Party looks for a new leader; even Santa feels the pinch from global supply chains.

programme.title: This Hour Has 22 Minutes
programme.desc: Taking on 2022; out with the old, in with the new.

programme.title: This Hour Has 22 Minutes
programme.desc: The month may be dry, but the spirits are high.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Denise Nurse helps a couple escape to the magnificent Scottish Borders.

programme.title: Gary's Magic Fort
programme.desc: Gary gets frustrated when Stuffy is scared of thunder; Gary realizes that he needs to listen to Stuffy, and together the friends learn about thunder; Stuffy's fears are eased and the party goes on.

programme.title: Kiri and Lou
programme.desc: Kiri makes an embarrassing mistake and learns to laugh about it.

programme.title: Daisy & the Gumboot Kids
programme.desc: On a visit to the pond, Daisy spots some baby ducklings; the yellow ducklings inspire her to make pom pom ducklings with the Gumboot Kids.

programme.title: Jessie & the Gumboot Kids
programme.desc: The Gumboot Kids explore a cave; Jessie Farrell sings a song about caves; Scout and Daisy join in on the discovery.

programme.title: Scout & the Gumboot Kids
programme.sub-title: The Case of the Soothing Shrub
programme.desc: The Gumboot Kids head out to solve the mystery behind a soothing shrub.

programme.title: Mittens & Pants
programme.desc: Mayor Sourdough wants to build a cat playground for the kittens but realizes he doesn't know what kittens like; he gets Mittens to show him what being a cat is all about.

programme.title: Dylan's Playtime Adventures
programme.desc: Dylan imagines he's a crossing guard.

programme.title: Hop
programme.desc: A discord leads to the Hoppers splitting into two clubs, leaving Penny caught in the middle.

programme.title: Go Togo
programme.desc: When Stella and Wheeler go to Transitville Island, Togo feels left out when he can't get across the lake; Dr. Repairo helps him focus on the present moment.

programme.title: Mighty Express
programme.desc: Build-It Brock gives Liza a tour of his favorite builds to help inspire Liza's own creation.

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Maggie's slip of the tongue raises Ben's suspicions, and Jodie jumps to Bethany's defence.

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Ben forces Maggie to reveal that Alan was not his father.

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Ronnie learns of Carl's latest ploy to extort cash from Debbie.

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Debbie makes her presence felt at the hotel, and Sam accuses Will of intimidation.

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Summer challenges Debbie's version of how Billy died, and Will denies Sam's allegation.

programme.title: About That
programme.desc: Andrew Chang expands the understanding of the stories everybody's talking about.

programme.title: Rosemary Barton Live
programme.desc: Rosemary Barton delivers a weekly dose of compelling conversations and need-to-know political news and issues affecting Canadians.

programme.title: Marketplace
programme.desc: Driving into traffic jams plaguing cities across Canada to crown the country's worst commute, as we reveal the true cost of congestion and the solutions that aren't moving anywhere thanks to a lack of political will.

programme.title: Land and Sea
programme.desc: Summer and fall of 2025 brought drought and forest fires to Newfoundland and Labrador; towns are becoming more and more worried about water; well talk about the impacts of dryness.

programme.title: Still Standing
programme.desc: M'Chigeeng First Nation on Manitoulin Island was once the center for the Anishinaabe people; this changed dramatically when a series of treaties cut off the community from their traditional lands.

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours in...
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade dashes to Dubrovnik, Croatia, with Stephen Merchant for his final outing.

programme.title: Track and Field
programme.desc: From Gaborone, Botswana.

programme.title: Jamie's Super Food Family Classics
programme.desc: Jamie makes roasted stone fruit crumble. He also makes a Sardinian-inspired tomato sauce to go with a squash and ricotta ravioli.

programme.title: The Great Canadian Pottery Throw Down
programme.desc: The remaining potters find themselves playing electrician when creating a table lamp.

programme.title: Dragons' Den
programme.desc: An entrepreneur hopes his business is worth a ton; a sibling duo look to harvest liquid assets; looking to distill a new trend.

programme.desc: When a drought on Dino Island causes the wild dinos to fight over their water supply, it's up to the Dino Ranchers to intervene.

programme.title: Live: CBC Toronto News
programme.desc: Dwight Drummond and team take a comprehensive look at the top stories, with breaking news, reports and updates relevant to the city of Toronto.

programme.title: Live: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: The latest hockey action from across the NHL.

programme.title: Son of a Critch
programme.desc: Based on an award-winning memoir from Mark Critch, "Son of a Critch" is the hilarious and very real story of a young Mark coming of age in the 1980s. Developed from Critch's 2018 memoir, which was in turn based on his real life experiences growing up in Newfoundland, Canada, the series is a heartfelt window in the life of a child who is much older inside than his 11 years. He uses comedy and self-deprecation to win friends and connect with the small collection of people in his limited junior high world.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The National
programme.desc: CBC's flagship nightly news program, featuring the day's top stories with in-depth and original journalism; Adrienne Arsenault and Ian Hanomansing anchor.

programme.title: Live: CBC Toronto News at 11
programme.desc: The host presents information about the social, economic and political issues of the day and provides updates on current events in Toronto.

programme.title: Still Standing
programme.desc: Temagami, Ontario, is synonymous with old-growth and the struggle to balance economics and conservation.

programme.desc: Sarah sneaks round to see Todd while Theo is out, and Jodie reveals her mischief to Gemma.
